name: Brandon Cantrell
positioning: Analytics engineering, AI product, and data platform practitioner focused on turning messy data into decision-ready systems.
principles: Treat analytics work like product work: instrument it, learn from user behavior, and improve the experience.
Favor fast, opinionated systems when they create speed to insight, activation, and impact.
Put business definitions in durable semantic layers so dashboards, notebooks, and AI interfaces can use the same logic.
Choose architecture based on workload shape: transactional systems need different tools than analytics engines.
Standards stick when the system makes the right path the easiest path.
